data.ocrPrompt: Extract ALL readable text from this image. Return ONLY the raw text content, exactly as it appears. Do not add commentary, analysis, or formatting. If there is no text in the image, return "NO_TEXT_FOUND". Preserve the original language (Filipino, English, Taglish, etc.)
data.rawExtractedText:
Bongbong Marcos
19h
Sa oras ng panganib, hindi dapat madagdagan ang hirap ng ating mga kababayan.
Kaya ipinag-utos ko ang agarang pagkilos ng mga ahensya ng pamahalaan upang tumugon sa
ashfall mula sa Mayon Volcano eruption.
Nililinis ang mga kalsada, namamahagi ng N95 masks, at naglalagay ng water stations, mobile
clinics, at tulong para sa mga lumikas upang maprotektahan ang ating mga komunidad.
Patuloy nating binabantayan ang sitwasyon, kabilang ang panganib ng lahar.
...
Alam nating may epekto ito sa kalusugan at kabuhayan ng ating mga kababayan, kaya't tuloy-
tuloy ang tulong ng pamahalaan hanggang makabalik sa normal ang pang-araw-araw na buhay ng
bawat pamilyang apektado.
COURTESY DOST-PHIVOLCS
May 2, 2026
DOST-PHIV RTVM
PHILIPPINE INSTITUTE OF
VOLCANOLOGY AND SEISMOLOGY
OneDOST4U: Solutions and Opportunities for All
PRESIDENTIAL BROADCAST
Mayo:02 Valcano 2026-05-02 05:41 PM

data.rawResponse:
```json
{
  "label": "True",
  "confidence": 95,
  "marites_explanation": "Ayy besh, mukhang true 'to! Mayon Volcano erupted nga noong May 2, 2026, at nag-utos si BBM ng tulong. May mga reports pa from The Guardian, Al Jazeera, at Bloomberg about the eruption and evacuations. Kaya go, share this good news!",
  "claims": [
    "Mayon Volcano erupted.",
    "Government agencies are responding to the ashfall from the Mayon Volcano eruption.",
    "Roads are being cleaned, N95 masks are being distributed, and water stations and mobile clinics are being set up.",
    "Assistance is being provided to evacuees."
  ],
  "evidence": [
    "Multiple credible sources (The Guardian, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, Manila Times) confirm the Mayon Volcano eruption on May 2, 2026.",
    "Sources mention ashfall, evacuations, and government response."
  ],
  "linguistic_flags": [],
  "fact_correction": null
}
```

data.label: True
data.explanation: Ayy besh, mukhang true 'to! Mayon Volcano erupted nga noong May 2, 2026, at nag-utos si BBM ng tulong. May mga reports pa from The Guardian, Al Jazeera, at Bloomberg about the eruption and evacuations. Kaya go, share this good news!
claims: Government agencies are responding to the ashfall from the Mayon Volcano eruption.
Roads are being cleaned, N95 masks are being distributed, and water stations and mobile clinics are being set up.
Assistance is being provided to evacuees.
evidence: Multiple credible sources (The Guardian, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, Manila Times) confirm the Mayon Volcano eruption on May 2, 2026.
Sources mention ashfall, evacuations, and government response.

data.summary: Para malaman kung factual ang claim, tignan natin kung may reliable sources na nagko-confirm ng details.
data.tip: Always check kung ang claims ay sinusuportahan ng maraming mapagkakatiwalaang sources bago maniwala agad.

data.details: Mukhang totoo naman ito based sa analysis ni Marites.

reasons: Government agencies are responding to the ashfall from the Mayon Volcano eruption.
Roads are being cleaned, N95 masks are being distributed, and water stations and mobile clinics are being set up.
Assistance is being provided to evacuees.
redFlags: Multiple credible sources (The Guardian, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, Manila Times) confirm the Mayon Volcano eruption on May 2, 2026.

harmScore.explanation: This content appears to be factual. Safe to share with context.

data.maritesMode: Ayy besh, mukhang true 'to! Mayon Volcano erupted nga noong May 2, 2026, at nag-utos si BBM ng tulong. May mga reports pa from The Guardian, Al Jazeera, at Bloomberg about the eruption and evacuations. Kaya go, share this good news!

literacyLesson.summary: Para malaman kung factual ang claim, tignan natin kung may reliable sources na nagko-confirm ng details.

points.issue: Yung post ni Bongbong Marcos nagsabi na nagkaroon ng Mayon Volcano eruption at nagresponde ang government.
points.correction: Maraming news outlets tulad ng The Guardian at Al Jazeera ang nag-report ng parehong pangyayari, kaya mas credible.

points.issue: Binanggit din sa post yung ashfall, paglikas ng mga tao, at tulong na binibigay.
points.correction: Ang mga balita ay nagbigay din ng detalye tungkol sa ashfall at evacuations, na nagpapatunay na accurate ang impormasyon.

points.issue: Ang claim ay nagmula mismo sa isang public official.
points.correction: Mas credible ito kasi responsibilidad ng government na magbigay ng accurate updates sa publiko.

literacyLesson.tip: Always check kung ang claims ay sinusuportahan ng maraming mapagkakatiwalaang sources bago maniwala agad.
